evals.name: katie-week
evals.prompt: Build the stories for the week — Zipline base. Reply keyword rotation per input doc. (Katie's BRAND.md in Project Knowledge; 5 days of story text provided.)
evals.expected_output: 20 slides planned in Katie's brand. Question-punctuation rule fires on Friday Slide 1. Two CTA versions per day. ONE elaboration suggestion.

evals.name: missing-brand-precheck
evals.prompt: Build the stories for the week. Sample slide text provided. No BRAND.md in Project Knowledge.
evals.expected_output: Skill stops, invokes define-brand-voice, preserves slide text.

evals.name: question-punctuation
evals.prompt: Build Monday's story. Slides 1 and 3 contain questions without trailing '?'. (Katie's BRAND.md in Project Knowledge.)
evals.expected_output: Both questions receive '?' append. monday-slide-1.html and monday-slide-3.html show corrected text. No other content changed.
